# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 548. Inspection of Vehicles
##### § 548.251 — Department to Maintain Database

The department shall maintain an electronic database to which inspection stations may electronically submit the information required by Section 548.253 (Information to Be Submitted on Completion of Inspection) .

*Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1291 (H.B.2305), Sec. 25, eff. March 1, 2015.*

subsections.text: The department shall maintain an electronic database to which inspection stations may electronically submit the information required by Section 548.253 (Information to Be Submitted on Completion of Inspection) .
